name: rex
description: Config-driven, multi-tier agent system with composable agent primitives

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/types build && bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/work build && bun run --cwd packages/llm build && bun run --cwd packages/context build && bun run --cwd packages/tools build && bun run --cwd packages/agent build && bun run --cwd packages/orchestrator build && bun run --cwd packages/graphd build && bun run --cwd packages/comms-bus build
scripts.build:apps: bun run --cwd packages/harness-daemon build && bun run --cwd packages/tui build && bun run --cwd packages/launcher build
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/types clean && bun run --cwd packages/shared clean && bun run --cwd packages/work clean && bun run --cwd packages/llm clean && bun run --cwd packages/context clean && bun run --cwd packages/tools clean && bun run --cwd packages/agent clean && bun run --cwd packages/orchestrator clean && bun run --cwd packages/graphd clean && bun run --cwd packages/comms-bus clean
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/types lint && bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/llm lint && bun run --cwd packages/context lint && bun run --cwd packages/tools lint && bun run --cwd packages/agent lint && bun run --cwd packages/orchestrator lint && bun run --cwd packages/graphd lint && bun run --cwd packages/comms-bus lint
